TestCase z28Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n > 0 && t1.b != NULL) {
        int* follow_case_b = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
        memcpy(follow_case_b, t1.b, t1.n * sizeof(int));
        follow_case.b = follow_case_b;
    } else {
        // If no elements or b is NULL, set follow_case.b to NULL to avoid dangling pointer use
        follow_case.b = NULL;
    }
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n <= 0 || follow_case.b == NULL) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; i++) {
        follow_case.b[i] = follow_case.b[i] - 1;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
